2604.26805.title: Bian Que: An Agentic Framework with Flexible Skill Arrangement for Online System Operations
2604.26805.paper_summary: Operating and maintaining (O&M) large-scale online engine systems (search, recommendation, advertising) demands substantial human effort for release monitoring, alert response, and root cause analysis. While LLM-based agents are a natural fit for these tasks, the deployment bottleneck is not reasoning capability but orchestration: selecting, for each operational event, the relevant data (metrics, logs, change events) and the applicable operational knowledge (handbook rules and practitioner experience). Feeding all signals indiscriminately causes dilution and hallucination, while manually curating the event-to-(data, knowledge) mapping is intractable under dozens of daily releases. We present Bian Que, an agentic framework with three contributions: (i) a \emph{unified operational paradigm} abstracting day-to-day O&M into three canonical patterns: release interception, proactive inspection, and alert root cause analysis; (ii) \emph{Flexible Skill Arrangement}, where each Skill specifies which data and knowledge to retrieve for a given business-module context and can be automatically generated and updated by LLMs or iteratively refined through natural-language instructions from on-call engineers; (iii) a \emph{unified self-evolving mechanism} in which one correction signal drives two parallel pathways, case-memory-to-knowledge distillation and targeted Skill refinement. Deployed on the e-commerce search engine of KuaiShou, the major short-video platform in China, Bian Que reduces alert volume by 75%, achieves 80% root-cause analysis accuracy, and cuts mean time to resolution by over 50%. Our framework achieves 99.0% pass rate on offline evaluations. Our code is available at https://github.com/benchen4395/BianQue_Assistant.
2604.26805.paper_summary_zh: 操作和維護（O&M）大規模在線引擎系統（搜索、推薦、廣告）需要大量的人力來進行版本監控、警報響應和根本原因分析。雖然基於LLM的代理非常適合這些任務，但部署瓶頸不在於推理能力，而在於協調：為每個操作事件選擇相關數據（指標、日誌、變更事件）和適用的操作知識（手冊規則和實踐經驗）。不加區別地提供所有信號會導致稀釋和幻覺，而手動策劃事件到（數據、知識）的映射在每日數十次的版本發布下是不可行的。我們提出了Bian Que，一個具有三個貢獻的代理框架：（i）一個\emph{統一操作範式}，將日常O&M抽象為三個典範模式：版本攔截、主動檢查和警報根本原因分析；（ii）\emph{靈活技能安排}，每個技能指定在給定業務模塊上下文中檢索哪些數據和知識，並可以由LLM自動生成和更新，或通過值班工程師的自然語言指令進行迭代精煉；（iii）一個\emph{統一自我演化機制}，其中一個修正信號驅動兩條平行路徑，即案例記憶到知識的蒸餾和針對性的技能精煉。部署在中國主要短視頻平台快手的電子商務搜索引擎上，Bian Que將警報量減少了75％，實現了80％的根本原因分析準確率，並將平均解決時間縮短了50％以上。我們的框架在離線評估中達到了99.0％的通過率。我們的代碼可在https://github.com/benchen4395/BianQue_Assistant獲得。
2604.26805.author: Bochao Liu et.al.
2604.26805.authors: Bochao Liu, Zhipeng Qian, Yang Zhao, Xinyuan Jiang, Zihan Liang, Yufei Ma, Junpeng Zhuang, Ben Chen, Shuo Yang, Hongen Wan, Yao Wu, Chenyi Lei, Xiao Liang
